# MiOS (Modern immutable Operating System)

MiOS is a bootc-based, self-building, immutable workstation OS on Fedora Rawhide. It is engineered for high-performance virtualization (VFIO), local AI development, and transactional system stability.

## Core Documentation
- [INDEX.md](./INDEX.md): The Single Source of Truth (SSOT) for architectural laws and agent behavior.
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md): Unified hardware, filesystem, and virtualization blueprints.
- [ENGINEERING.md](./ENGINEERING.md): Security, build-modes, automation pipeline, and AI integration.
- [PACKAGES.md](./usr/share/doc/mios/PACKAGES.md): The definitive package manifest.

## AI & Agent Integration
- [system-prompt.md](./system-prompt.md): The authoritative persona for MiOS agents.
- [.cursorrules](./.cursorrules): Context rules for VS Code Cursor.
- [.clinerules](./.clinerules): Context rules for Cline/Roo-Code.
- [.github/ai-instructions.md](./.github/ai-instructions.md): Integration instructions for GitHub agents.
- [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt): Comprehensive flattened context for LLM ingestion.

## Key Technical Specs
- **OS Base**: Fedora Rawhide (bootc/OCI-native).
- **Immutability**: composefs + fs-verity.
- **Hardware**: Universal silicon support (NVIDIA GSP, AMD ROCm, Intel Arc).
- **API**: Local OpenAI-compatible surface at `http://localhost:8080/v1`.

## Repository Structure
- `usr/`, `etc/`, `var/`: Rootfs-native overlay structure.
- `automation/`: Numbered build pipeline (01-99).
- `tools/`: Utility and diagnostic toolchain.
- `specs/`: Detailed research and architectural blueprints.
